lines.english: They do their evil deeds, and pretend otherwise;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
but in the Court of the Lord, they shall be bound and gagged like thieves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਏਕੁ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal ek samaanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The One Lord is contained in the water, the land and the sky. ||1||Pause||
Those who remember the Lord belong to the Lord.
Bound and gagged in the City of Death, they are punished and beaten. ||2||
Their inner beings are filled with poison, and yet with their mouths, they preach words of Ambrosial Nectar.
Hiding behind many screens, they commit acts of corruption,
- O Nanak, the Lord, the Architect of Destiny, is merciful to them. ||4||71||140||
Those whose inner beings are true, who are attuned to the ambrosial essence of the Naam, the Name of the Lord
but in an instant, they are revealed to all the world. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਦੇ ਉਤਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: raam rang kade utar na jaae |
lines.english: The Lord's Love shall never leave or depart.
They alone understand, unto whom the Perfect Guru gives it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਰੰਗ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laal rang pooran purakh bidhaataa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Love of the Beloved, the Architect of Destiny, is perfect. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raataa so man saachaa |
lines.english: One whose mind is attuned to the Lord's Love is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin har simaran sukh nahee paaeaa |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, peace is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa kaa rang na utarai jaae |2|
lines.english: The color of His Love shall never fade away. ||2||
Sitting in the Society of the Saints, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਦਇਆਲ ॥੪॥੭੨॥੧੪੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak gur bhe hai deaal |4|72|141|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Guru has become merciful to them. ||4||72||141||
All the other loves and tastes of Maya are bland and insipid. ||3||
Those who are imbued with love by the Guru become happy.
Meditating in remembrance on the Lord Master, sinful mistakes are erased,
and one comes to abide in peace, celestial joy and bliss. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, there is no fear or doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਸਭੁ ਮਿਟਿਓ ਅੰਦੇਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam japat sabh mittio andesaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all anxieties are dispelled. ||1||Pause||
The Lord's humble servants place their faith in the Lord.
Granting His Grace, God has released me from bondage.
The Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung there, day and night. ||2||
He has given me the Support of His Lotus Feet. ||3||
Who continually drinks in the Immaculate Praises of the Lord. ||4||73||142||
Says Nanak, faith comes into the mind of His servant,
Those who deal in the Lord's wealth are perfect.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: har charanee jaa kaa man laagaa |
lines.english: Those who keep their minds attached to the Lord's Feet

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭਾਗਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dookh darad bhram taa kaa bhaagaa |1|
lines.english: - pain, suffering and doubt run away from them. ||1||
Those humble beings, unto whom the Lord of the Universe shows mercy,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਲਾਗੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: se jan laage gur kee paaee |2|
lines.english: fall at the Guru's Feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਨਿਵਾਜੇ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸੂਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh nivaaje so jan sooraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who are honored by the Lord are the true spiritual heroes. ||1||Pause||
They are blessed with peace, celestial bliss, tranquility and ecstasy;
In the Saadh Sangat, I have earned the wealth of the Naam.
chanting and meditating, they live in supreme bliss. ||3||
Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, all suffering is eradicated.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, God has relieved my pain. ||4||74||143||
Chant the Lord's Name, hundreds of thousands of times, O my dear,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit ras peevahu prabh piaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and drink deeply of the Ambrosial Essence of God. ||1||Pause||
The Lord's Lotus Feet are enshrined within my mind. ||1||
Sexual desire, anger, greed and ego are eradicated;
chanting and meditating, you shall live in supreme bliss. ||2||
Peace, celestial bliss, pleasures and the greatest ecstasy are obtained;
Grant Your Grace, O God, O Merciful to the meek.
Please bless Nanak with the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||4||75||144||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਸਭ ਧੋਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang kilabikh sabh dhoe |3|
lines.english: in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, all sinful mistakes are washed away. ||3||
